examples: A new microcomputer-controlled versatile spectrofluorometer with the function of constant energy and variable-angle synchronous scanning has been developed.
The changes of the intracellular concentration of free calcium ion in myocardial cells in each group under different conditions were dynamically measured with spectrofluorometer.
The evaluation of nerve cell aging index: The level of lipofuscin (relative fluorescent value) index of cells aging was detected by micro-spectrofluorometer to reflect the degree of cell aging;
